scripts.build:desktop: npm run build --workspace @queuemaster/dashboard && npm run build --workspace @queuemaster/desktop
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:dashboard && npm run build --workspace @queuemaster/desktop && npm run dist:mac --workspace @queuemaster/desktop
scripts.dev:app: concurrently -k -n server,agent,desktop "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:agent" "npm run dev:desktop"
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -k -n dashboard,electron "npm run dev --workspace @queuemaster/dashboard" "npm run dev --workspace @queuemaster/desktop"
